reasons: Lolita can block important ranged pressure, giving Lesley more freedom to hold sniper spacing.
Lolita's frontline zoning helps Lesley deal damage without being forced into short-range trades.

proof.summary: Lolita protects Lesley's backline angle, allowing Lesley to keep firing from safe distance.
worksBestWhen: Lolita blocks real damage windows, not bait skills.
Lesley positions behind the shield angle.
failureCases: Enemies flank Lesley instead of attacking from the front.
Lolita's shield is used before the enemy commits.

reasons: Diggie can protect Lesley from heavy crowd-control engage during critical fight windows.
Lesley benefits from anti-engage support because her damage pattern depends on staying alive and spaced.

proof.summary: Diggie reduces the value of enemy crowd-control engage so Lesley can keep distance and continue firing.
worksBestWhen: Diggie saves his protection for the main enemy engage.
Lesley stays close enough to receive the protection.
failureCases: Diggie's key skill is baited before the real fight.
Lesley is caught outside Diggie's protection range.

reasons: Franco can pull a target into Lesley's firing range, creating a simple pickoff window.
Lesley can follow Franco's catch safely without needing to overstep first.

proof.summary: Franco isolates a target, and Lesley converts the catch with long-range damage or finishing shots.
worksBestWhen: Franco hooks a squishy or low-mobility target.
Lesley is already positioned to follow up.
failureCases: Franco hooks a tank or bait target.
Lesley has no vision or angle to shoot.

reasons: Rafaela's heal and movement-speed support help Lesley maintain distance in lane and teamfights.
Rafaela's slow and vision pressure can make it easier for Lesley to kite and finish targets.

proof.summary: Rafaela supports Lesley's spacing with healing and speed, making backline kiting more reliable.
worksBestWhen: Rafaela saves speed support for enemy dive attempts.
Lesley uses the movement window to reposition instead of chasing too deep.
failureCases: Burst damage kills Lesley before healing matters.
Rafaela is forced to heal other teammates during Lesley's danger window.

reasons: Tigreal can hold the frontline and force enemies to respect his engage, giving Lesley space to deal damage.
Tigreal's crowd-control setup creates safer shooting windows against enemies who would otherwise dive Lesley.

proof.summary: Tigreal creates space and control pressure, while Lesley attacks from behind the frontline.
worksBestWhen: Tigreal zones enemy divers before they reach Lesley.
Lesley follows from safe distance rather than stepping into the engage.
failureCases: Tigreal engages too far forward and leaves Lesley unprotected.
Enemy assassins flank around the frontline.
